vocab.meaning: những đỉnh núi đá lởm chởm/hiểm trở
vocab.example: I am particularly drawn to the dramatic silhouette of craggy peaks against a clear blue sky.

vocab.meaning: sự thăng trầm/thủy triều lên xuống nhịp nhàng
vocab.example: Watching the rhythmic ebb and flow of the tide has a uniquely hypnotic and calming effect on me.

vocab.meaning: sự hùng vĩ về mặt địa hình
vocab.example: The sheer topographical grandeur of the Himalayas makes me feel insignificant in the best possible way.

vocab.meaning: đường chân trời không bị che khuất
vocab.example: I prefer the coast because it offers an uninterrupted horizon that gives a sense of infinite freedom.

vocab.meaning: vùng chân núi xanh mướt cỏ cây
vocab.example: Hiking through the verdant foothills provides a refreshing escape from the concrete jungle of the city.

vocab.meaning: dải xanh lam bao la (thường chỉ mặt biển)
vocab.example: Nothing compares to the sight of the azure expanse stretching out as far as the eye can see.
Adventurous travelers often favor the mountains for the challenge of navigating through rugged terrain.
I gravitate towards the sea because the mild maritime climate is much more agreeable to me than mountain air.
The sight of sheer cliffs dropping into the churning ocean is both terrifying and exhilarating.

vocab.meaning: sự tĩnh lặng vùng núi cao
vocab.example: I find that alpine tranquility is the perfect antidote to the high-pressure environment of my workplace.
